mapper.select: select count(1) from comm_apply where create_time >= #{from}
select count(1) from comm_apply where status in ('0', '2')
select round( avg(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, finish_time)), 2 ) from comm_apply where status = '3' and finish_time is not null and create_time is not null

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as dt, count(1) as cnt from comm_apply where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval (#{days} - 1) day) group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by dt
